query:
SELECT c.id, c.nomeCliente, c.valorVenda, c.createdAt, u.name as corretor_nome, u.id as corretor_id
FROM contratos c
JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%Nunes%'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC;
